news.title: Google Adds ChatGPT and Claude Import Tools to Gemini for Memory and Chat History
news.description:
Google has introduced import tools for Gemini that enable users to transfer their stored memories and complete conversation histories from ChatGPT and Claude.

news.title: Federal Court Blocks Pentagon Order Designating AI Firm Anthropic as National Security Risk
news.description: Federal Judge Issues Preliminary Injunction Against Pentagon Order A U.S. federal judge has blocked an order from the Department of War that designated artificial intelligence company Anthropic as a national security supply chain risk. The ruling, issued Thur…

news.title: Chinese GPU maker Moore Threads wins US$91 million AI cluster order
news.description: Chinese GPU developer Moore Threads has secured a CNY660 million (approx. US$95.5 million) contract to supply its KUAE intelligent computing cluster, marking a shift from standalone GPUs to large-scale AI training infrastructure.

news.title: DIGITIMES Insight: Terafab funding questions emerge as CPU resurgence reshapes AI chip demand
news.description: On a recent podcast, DIGITIMES analyst Luke Lin spotlighted Elon Musk's Terafab as a retro IDM bet with major funding questions, while arguing CPUs are resurging in the AI era as inference demand tightens supply and reshapes semiconductor priorities.

news.title: MPI probe card lead times stretch to 6 months on AI chip testing surge

news.title: OpenAI scraps Sora to double down on enterprise AI
news.description: OpenAI has shut down its Sora video-generation platform, abandoning a high-profile push into entertainment and consumer creativity as it pivots toward enterprise AI and productivity tools.

news.title: Space data center startup Starcloud raises $170M at $1.1B valuation

news.title: Samsung SDI expands LFP cathode supply chain to target US AI data center ESS market

news.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang reframes AI compute as a token-minting revenue machine
news.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said on the Lex Fridman Podcast that computing is undergoing a structural shift — from a "storage system," where data is pre-defined and retrieved, to a "generative system" capable of contextual understanding.

stocks.ai_explanation: The NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) is a technology company primarily focused on graphics processing units (GPUs) and artificial intelligence (AI) solutions. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) is a multinational technology giant known for its Windows operating system, Office suite, and Azure cloud services. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) is a technology company that operates under the brand name Google, offering search engine services, web applications, and hardware products. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) is an American multinational retail corporation that specializes in e-commerce, cloud computing, and online streaming services. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Meta Platforms, Inc. (META) is a social media and internet company founded by Mark Zuckerberg. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
